name: evertex fabrinology limited
summary: evertex fabrinology limited manufactures and sells fabrics in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers circular and warp knit fabrics, as well as tricot greiges. It is also involved in dyeing and finishing circular and warp knits, as well as woven fabrics for suiting applications. The company was formerly known as Evertex Dyeing & Finishing. evertex fabrinology limited was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
